ddls:
CREATE TABLE "casinos" (
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casino */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the casino */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus amount offered by the casino */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the casino */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the casino */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the casino operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used by the casino */,
  "license_info" TEXT /* License information for regulatory compliance */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the casino was established */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games offered by the casino */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Accepted payment methods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casino_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user's identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casino being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text written by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply from the casino to the user's review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_casino_id FOREIGN KEY ("casino_id") REFERENCES casinos ("casino_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonus_types" (
  "bonus_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus type */,
  "bonus_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bonus type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus type */,
  "wagering_requirements" TEXT /* Wagering requirements for the bonus */,
  "maximum_bonus_amount" TEXT /* Maximum bonus amount */,
  "minimum_deposit" TEXT /* Minimum deposit required to receive the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casino_bonuses" (
  "casino_bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casino bonus */,
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* ID of the casino offering the bonus */,
  "bonus_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bonus type */,
  "bonus_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "bonus_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the bonus offer */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions for the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casino_bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casino_bonuses_casino_id FOREIGN KEY ("casino_id") REFERENCES casinos ("casino_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casino_bonuses_bonus_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bonus_type_id") REFERENCES bonus_types ("bonus_type_id")
)
column_names: Bonus amount offered by the casino
Primary currency used by the casino
Number of games offered by the casino
Date of birth of the user
Date the user joined the platform
URL of the user's profile picture
Verification status of the user's identity

Review text written by the user
